headline: CarMax Board Refresh And Goodwill Impairment Put Valuation In Focus
summary: CarMax (NYSE:KMX) has added two new directors to its board following engagement with activist investor Starboard Value. Starboard Value is withdrawing its competing board nominations as part of this agreement. The company has reported a substantial non cash goodwill impairment for the quarter. CarMax, a large used vehicle retailer and auto finance provider, sits at the center of a sector that has faced shifting demand patterns, changing consumer preferences, and evolving credit conditions...
